name: 6sense Breakthrough
description: 6sense's annual conference for ABM and revenue teams. Covers intent-driven ABM, predictive analytics, pipeline acceleration, and the 6sense platform ecosystem.

name: Demandbase ABM Innovation Summit
description: Demandbase's flagship ABM event. Covers account intelligence, ABM advertising, website personalization, and building one-to-few and one-to-one ABM programs.

name: B2B Marketing Exchange
description: Strong ABM track covering account selection, orchestration, measurement, and the intersection of ABM with demand generation strategy.

name: Forrester B2B Summit
description: Forrester's premier B2B event with extensive ABM content. Research-driven sessions on ABM maturity models, buying group strategy, and revenue impact measurement.

name: ITSMA Marketing Vision
description: Focused on enterprise and strategic ABM. Covers one-to-one ABM for large accounts, executive engagement, and long-cycle B2B marketing strategies.

name: ABM Leadership Alliance Summit
description: Exclusive summit for ABM leaders. Covers ABM program design, team structure, measurement frameworks, and cross-functional alignment between sales and marketing.

name: Pipeline Summit
description: Covers pipeline generation with strong ABM content. Sessions on account-based pipeline strategy, multi-channel orchestration, and ABM-driven revenue acceleration.

name: Adobe Summit
description: Adobe's flagship conference with ABM-relevant tracks on Marketo Engage, personalization at scale, and advanced segmentation for account-based programs.

name: Dreamforce
description: Salesforce's massive conference with ABM integration sessions. Covers CRM-based account targeting, sales-marketing alignment, and data-driven account strategies.

name: MarketingProfs B2B Forum
description: Practical B2B marketing conference with growing ABM content. Covers account-based content strategy, personalization tactics, and ABM measurement.

name: Terminus Flip My Funnel
description: Built around the flipped funnel philosophy. Covers account-based advertising, multi-channel ABM orchestration, and the evolution of ABM beyond traditional demand gen.

name: FlipMyFunnel
description: Community-driven ABM movement and conference. Covers ABM philosophy, go-to-market alignment, and building ABM programs from the ground up. Strong networking focus.
